checks.label: Autonomous loop ledger is static review-only.
Loop boundary keeps Zurich date, 5-minute interval and 24:00 stop.
Loop boundary requires time check, summary and memory capture each fire.
At least three fire records are captured.
Every fire record has primary delta and check evidence.
Current green state records current full review and route smoke.
Memory additions include Fire State, Toolchain Readiness and GitHub Imperigo.
Blocked boundaries keep owner-go, heavy checks, static export, external accounts and costs gated.
Component imports the autonomous loop ledger contract.
Component renders autonomous loop ledger copy.
Component renders fire records, memory and blocked boundaries.
Orbit route imports the autonomous loop ledger component.
Section index links to autonomous loop ledger.

next_actions: Route-Smoke und Full-Review um das Ledger erweitern.
Beim naechsten Fire entweder Push-Decision-Draft lokal vorbereiten oder weitere Runtime-/Memory-Grenzen schaerfen.
Nach User-Gute-Nacht pausiert bleiben; naechster sinnvoller Schritt ist eine Morgenroutine mit frischem Statuscheck.
